zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey Dixwell於1530年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾努聶亞頓時，他的父親William Dixwell29歲，母親Elizabeth Knight26歲。他於1563年與Ellen Lowe在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾可爾希爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1599年12月16日在英國瓦維其可爾福享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey Dixwell于1530年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾努聶亞頓时，他的父亲William Dixwell29岁，母亲Elizabeth Knight26岁。他于1563年与Ellen Lowe在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾可爾希爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1599年12月16日在英国瓦維其可爾福享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dixwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

History: John Dixwell (c. 1607–1698/9), a regicide who signed Charles I's death warrant, fled from England to Hanau, Germany. From Hanau he migrated to New England, where he was first mentioned as being in America in 1664/5. The son of William Dixwell of Coton Hall, near Rugby, Warwickshire, John settled in New Haven, CT, where he assumed the name of James Davids.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey Dixwell was born in 1530, in Nuneaton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Dixwell, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Knight, was 26. He married Ellen Lowe in 1563, in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 16 December 1599, in Churchover, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey Dixwell est né en 1530, à Nuneaton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Dixwell, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Knight, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Lowe en 1563, à Coleshill, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 16 décembre 1599, à Churchover, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey Dixwell(이)가 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 누니앳에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Dixwell(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Knight(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1563년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 콜레시에서 Ellen Lowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1599년 12월 16일 영국 워윅실르 c후르초버에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey Dixwell родился в 1530 г. в местности нунитон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Dixwell было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Knight, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Lowe в 1563 г. в местности колешилл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 16 декабря 1599 г. в местности чурчовир, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.
